finding_results.evidence: Two instances remain: (1) chapters/chapter_16.md:27 retains 'Not overturned. Not appealed. Not strategically dissolved...' as the establishing use of the device; (2) chapters/chapter_16.md:183 retains 'Not optimized. Not classified. Not infrastructure. Just two people...' as the climactic payoff. Removed from: chapters/chapter_16.md:119 (rewrote 'Not released, because release implied...' to 'The removal carried no intention — no hand on a latch, no one reconsidering'), chapters/chapter_16.md:125 (rewrote 'Not numbness.' to 'His jaw ached.' — sensory grounding replacing negation), chapters/chapter_16.md:169 (removed 'Not freed. Released.' so the sentence flows directly from 'had been released. The way you release a thing'). Two instances total, separated by 156 lines, final instance at line 183 (after line 160).
finding_results.notes: Line 143 contains a structurally similar pattern in Mira's dialogue ('Not interesting enough... Not unpopular enough... Just —') but this was not flagged in the finding, functions as character voice in a comic beat rather than the narrator's emotional-processing formula, and is preserved to protect Mira's idiolect.

finding_results.evidence: Line 27 catalogue reduced from 4 parallel items to 2 at chapters/chapter_16.md:27 ('their marriage into a strategic asset and their bathroom schedule into a resource allocation'). Line 33 wall-metaphor anaphora compressed from 3 sentences to 1 at chapters/chapter_16.md:33 ('Mira had mapped the wall, located a crack, and filed a formal objection through it'). Line 105 table-where anaphora reduced from 3 to 2 at chapters/chapter_16.md:105 (kept midnight-screen and Theo-cereal instances, removed printouts/maps instance). Climactic catalogue at chapters/chapter_16.md:169 preserved in full (8+ 'its X' items). Short walk-catalogue at chapters/chapter_16.md:183 preserved (3 items, under threshold). Only 1 passage retains a 4+ item parallel catalogue (line 169), well within the 2-passage maximum. Longest catalogue is in the final movement (line 169, after line 160).
finding_results.notes: The polysyndetic list at line 119 ('their apartment and their son's drawings and their midnight conversations...') uses chained 'and' rather than comma-separated parallel structure and was not flagged in the finding; preserved for emotional weight in the container metaphor.

finding_results.evidence: Short declarative sentences (under 15 words, emotional/sensory content) inserted into reflective passages: (1) chapters/chapter_16.md:27 — 'The peanut butter was drying on his fingers.' (8 words, sensory-tactile, Dan's stress-tell physical detail); (2) chapters/chapter_16.md:65 — 'The toast on the counter had gone cold.' (9 words, sensory-temperature, anchors abstract meditation in the physical scene); (3) chapters/chapter_16.md:125 — 'His jaw ached.' (3 words, somatic sensation replacing abstract negation); (4) chapters/chapter_16.md:169 — 'Now they were sitting at their kitchen table.' (8 words), 'The light came in.' (4 words), 'The coffee grew cold.' (4 words) — three short sensory sentences breaking the 220-word recursive passage. At least 4 of the 5 longest paragraphs now contain short emotional/sensory sentences (lines 65, 125, 169, 183). No stretch of 150+ consecutive words proceeds without a sentence under 20 words.
finding_results.notes: The chapter's second half (post-section-break) now has significantly more rhythmic variation. Existing short sentences in reflective passages were also preserved: 'These were the things.' (line 123), 'The apartment was warm.' (line 159), 'The world worked.' (line 183), 'The water was warm on his hands.' (line 183). New insertions are character-true to Dan's stress-tell of fixating on irrelevant physical details under emotional pressure.

summary: All three findings addressed. The 'Not X. Not Y. Just Z.' negation formula reduced from 5 instances to 2 (lines 27 and 183), spaced 156 lines apart, with the payoff reserved for the closing movement. Removed instances at lines 119, 125, and 169 were replaced with positive constructions (sensory grounding, direct statement of feeling, removal of redundant negation) rather than softened — the emotional content lands harder through specificity. Accumulative catalogues compressed at lines 27 (4 items to 2), 33 (3 anaphoric sentences to 1), and 105 (3 table-where anaphora to 2), reserving the full catalogue for the climactic paragraph at line 169. Six short declarative sentences inserted into reflective passages as emotional/sensory punctuation, breaking the monotone of long recursive sentences in the chapter's heaviest interiority passages. All revisions preserve the chapter's dark-comic register, Dan's voice signatures, dialogue contraction levels, and continuity details. No content was softened or sanitized; the bedroom-emptiness passage (line 125) and container-metaphor passage (line 119) are emotionally sharper in the revised versions.
